name: Yankee Style BBQ Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons fresh lime juice or lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a large heavy-bottomed skillet over medium-high heat. Add meat and brown on both sides for about 4 minutes per side.
3. Sprinkle liquid smoke over the bottom of a roasting pan. Place the rack in the pan, then place the meat on the rack and cover.
4. Bake at 375°F for 1 hour. Reduce oven temperature to 250°F.
5. In a small Dutch oven, heat remaining oil over medium heat. Add onion and cook for 6 minutes or until softened.
6. Add ketchup, chili sauce, molasses, vinegar, hot pepper sauce, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, black pepper, and water. Simmer for about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice. Allow to cool, then pour into a bowl and refrigerate until the meat is cooked.
8. Once the meat is done and cool enough to handle, pull it apart into strands. Cut into 2-inch pieces and add to the sauce.
9. Return beef and sauce to the Dutch oven. Simmer, covered, for 1 hour, stirring occasionally. Add more water during cooking if needed.
10. Serve on toasted buns with potato salad.
